title: polypodium articulatum
intro: Polypodium articulatum, also known as the articulated polypody, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with P. articulatum include reduced inflammation and improved wound healing, as well as potential antimicrobial activity against certain pathogens. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to utilize its medicinal properties.
